      • processEachFileReferenceURI

        public java.util.List<FileReference> processEachFileReferenceURI(GroupedPropertiesImpl.UriTransformation transformation)
        Transform each file references included in this Grouped Properties using the supplied transformation. This returns a list of all file references after modification.
        Parameters:
        transformation - The transformation to apply to each file reference.
        Returns:
        the list of file references.

      • getAllFileReferences

        public java.util.List<FileReference> getAllFileReferences()
        Get all file references included in this Grouped Properties. This is used for dependency discovery. The result list should be alphabetized and free of duplicate references.
        Returns:
        the list of file references.
